message:
fix(setup): use first identity file only + update tests for additive ssh_domains

- ssh_option is a Lua table (key-value), so duplicate identityfile keys
  are impossible. Use only the first identity file per host (SSH config
  tries in order, so the first is typically the most specific).
- Update test assertions to match new additive ssh_domains pattern
  (config.ssh_domains = config.ssh_domains or {} + table.insert).
- Add new test verifying identity file emission and uniqueness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
